name: gamedaywire
description: Your Daily Sports & Entertainment News Feed — Automated Programmatic SEO Blog Engine

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "pnpm --filter backend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter frontend start" "pnpm --filter backend start"
scripts.cron:dry-run: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const job = process.argv[1]; if (!job) { console.error('Usage: pnpm cron:dry-run <jobName>'); process.exit(1); } execSync('npx tsx cron/' + job + '.ts --dry-run', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
